interaction_phrase: establishes manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries and begins to integrate quantum photonic devices
occurrence_sentence: PsiQuantum establishes manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries and begins to integrate quantum photonic devices (including single photon sources and superconducting detectors) into a mature, high-volume, commercial semiconductor foundry.

interaction_phrase: unveils a partnership and major $22.5 million contract with the Air Force
occurrence_sentence: PsiQuantum unveils a partnership and major $22.5 million contract with the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) in Rome, New York, marking the beginning of a years-long collaboration on quantum photonic chips.

interaction_phrase: $940M AUD ($620M USD) investment from the Australian government
occurrence_sentence: In a landmark $940M AUD ($620M USD) investment from the Australian government, PsiQuantum announced its first utility-scale, fault-tolerant quantum computer to be built in Brisbane.

occurrence_sentence: under the newly formed collaboration, PsiQuantum will work alongside the National Cancer Center Japan to advance fault-tolerant quantum algorithm development and collaborate with the National Cancer Center Japan and other leading pharmaceutical companies in Japan in the development of clinically relevant quantum applications.

interaction_phrase: utilize
occurrence_sentence: The partnership will also utilize PsiQuantum's software suite, Construct—a secure, end-to-end platform for designing, analyzing, and optimizing algorithms for fault-tolerant quantum computing.

interaction_phrase: Qlimate is a partner of Construct
occurrence_sentence: Qlimate is a partner of Construct, the quantum software company.

interaction_phrase: Ultimately, we believe this will make it easier for the wider community
occurrence_sentence: Circuit Designer was originally created for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) experts within PsiQuantum, but we believe that it can have broader utility. Circuit Designer can help expert researchers create new ideas and publish papers, companies learn the cutting edge, and students learn the fundamentals. The open-access Circuit Designer is just the start of our journey for releasing expert tools to the community and we have more to share soon.

interaction_phrase: If you find Circuit Designer exciting, also check out Construct, a platform
occurrence_sentence: Ultimately, scientific progress depends on removing barriers. Circuit designer was originally created for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) experts within PsiQuantum, but we believe that it can have broader utility. Circuit Designer can help expert researchers create new ideas and publish papers, companies learn the cutting edge, and students learn the fundamentals. The open-access Circuit Designer is just the start of our journey for releasing expert tools to the community and we have more to share soon. If you find Circuit Designer exciting, also check out Construct, a platform containing more FTQC development tools.

occurrence_sentence: PsiQuantum Corp 13/01/2026 [Company](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/category/Company) PsiQuantum Corp 13/01/2026 # [ PsiQuantum Collaborating with Airbus to Advance Quantum Computing for Aerospace ](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/airbus) PsiQuantum announced today that the company is collaborating with Airbus, Europe's largest aeronautics and space company, to advance applications in aerospace for fault-tolerant quantum computers.

interaction_phrase: will build its first US-based utility-scale quantum computer at the IQMP and
occurrence_sentence: PsiQuantum has been scaling its operations and will be breaking ground on its first two Quantum Data Centers in Brisbane, Australia and Chicago, Illinois in the coming months. In July 2024, the State of Illinois announced a $500M initiative to establish the Illinois Quantum & Microelectronics Park (IQMP) and its first two anchor tenants: DARPA and PsiQuantum. PsiQuantum will build its first US-based utility-scale quantum computer at the IQMP and DARPA will establish the Quantum Proving Ground at the IQMP in a partnership with the State of Illinois.
